channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Unknown languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (185765 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 185765

🍴 Forks: 108629

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-18T04:26:40Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 JackChen-me/open-multi-agent (5745 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: JackChen-me

📝 Repository: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent

📄 Descrizione: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 5745

🍴 Forks: 2264

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-framework ai-agents anthropic claude deepseek gemini grok llm local-llm mcp model-agnostic multi-agent nodejs ollama openai orchestration structured-output task-scheduling tool-use typescript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 🐍 wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep (5668 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: wanshuiyin

📝 Repository: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep

📄 Descrizione: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any LLM agent.

⭐ Stelle: 5668

🍴 Forks: 497

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: ai-research ai-tools aris autonomous-agent claude claude-code claude-code-skills codex deep-learning gpt idea-generation llm machine-learning mcp mcp-server ml-research openai paper-review paper-writing research-automation

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T07:31:45Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-07T04:11:07Z
